people_highlights.name: Anthropic
people_highlights.post:
We're launching the Anthropic STEM Fellows Program. 

AI will accelerate progress in science and engineering. We're looking for experts across these fields to work alongside our research teams on specific projects over a few months.

Learn more and apply: https://t.co/MoF60j53pX

people_highlights.name: François Chollet
people_highlights.post: One of the most jarring things about current AI is its lack of introspection ability and metacognition. It doesn't know what it doesn't know, how it knows, or how it could find out. It's a one-way system.
people_highlights.why: Recent post from Keras creator at Google

people_highlights.name: Ethan Mollick
people_highlights.post:
This wasn't the case with previous image generators, but the LLM you select has a huge effect on GPT-imagegen-2  output. GPT-5.4 Thinking and GPT-5.4 Pro will produce much better images, especially for complex things.

This is, of course, not intuitive or explained anywhere.
